Table of Contents

Class DalFactory

Namespace
DAL.Factory
Assembly
DAL.dll

Static service locator / factory for all repository singletons.

public static class DalFactory
Inheritance
object
DalFactory
Inherited Members
object.ToString()
object.Equals(object)
object.Equals(object, object)
object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
object.GetHashCode()
object.GetType()
object.MemberwiseClone()

Remarks

Each property follows a lazy-initialization pattern (_field ?? (_field = new ImplClass())), so repository instances are created on first access and reused thereafter within the process lifetime.

For single-repository (read-only) operations, use the singleton properties directly. For multi-repository write operations that require atomicity, use CreateUnitOfWork() to obtain a fresh IUnitOfWork instance that shares one connection and transaction across all enrolled repositories.

Properties

AgendaRepository

Singleton agenda (operating schedule) repository.

public static IAgendaRepository AgendaRepository { get; }

Property Value

IAgendaRepository

BalanceRepository

Singleton balance repository (backed by vw_Balance SQL view).

public static IBalanceRepository BalanceRepository { get; }

Property Value

IBalanceRepository

Singleton client-membership assignment repository.

public static IClienteMembresiaRepository ClienteMembresiaRepository { get; }

IClienteMembresiaRepository

ClienteRepository

Singleton client repository.

public static IClienteRepository ClienteRepository { get; }

Property Value

IClienteRepository

Singleton receipt repository (file system storage).

public static IComprobanteRepository ComprobanteFileRepository { get; }

Property Value

IComprobanteRepository

Singleton receipt repository (SQL Server storage).

public static IComprobanteRepository ComprobanteRepository { get; }

IComprobanteRepository

Methods

CreateUnitOfWork()

Creates and returns a new IUnitOfWork instance for transactional, multi-repository operations.

public static IUnitOfWork CreateUnitOfWork()
